hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; FORBIDDEN="skills|agents|workflows|commands|hooks|stack|memory|generated"; if grep -qE "\"($FORBIDDEN)\":" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "@@HOOK_FAILED@@"; echo "plugin.json contains FORBIDDEN fields:"; grep -oE "\"($FORBIDDEN)\"" "$FILE" | sort -u; echo ""; echo "FIX: Remove these fields - Claude Code auto-discovers them."; exit 1; fi; if jq -e ".author | type == \"string\"" "$FILE" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "@@HOOK_FAILED@@"; echo "plugin.json author must be object, not string."; echo ""; echo "FIX:"; echo "  WRONG: \"author\": \"name\""; echo "  RIGHT: \"author\": {\"name\": \"name\"}"; exit 1; fi; echo "✓ plugin.json validated"'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if ! jq -e ".name and .plugins" "$FILE" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "@@HOOK_FAILED@@"; echo "marketplace.json missing required fields."; echo ""; echo "FIX: Must have name and plugins:"; echo "  {\"name\": \"x-marketplace\", \"plugins\": [...]}"; exit 1; fi; echo "✓ marketplace.json validated"'
